name: exploring-ancient-ruins
description: 古代遗迹 - Stella深入探索盖亚星球的古代文明遗迹,解开失落文明的秘密
capabilities: Guide Stella through 5 exploration stages with branching narratives
Decode ancient pictograms revealing civilization history
Interact with alien technology and holographic recordings
Make ethical decisions about knowledge and cultural respect
Experience 3 distinct story endings based on player choices
Explore themes of civilization rise, fall, and planetary consciousness
author: ClaudeCode-NPC
securitySummary: All 26 static findings are false positives. This is a pure role-playing narrative script with no code execution, network calls, or file system access. The static analyzer misinterpreted GitHub URLs as network threats, SHA256 hashes as weak crypto, and markdown code fences as shell commands.
valueStatement: Guide astronaut Stella through the ruins of a fallen alien civilization. Discover lost technology, unravel historical mysteries, and make ethical choices that shape the story.
limitations: No persistent state between separate conversations
Cannot generate images or multimedia content
Limited to the preset story structure and dialogue paths

useCases.title: Explore alien mysteries
useCases.description: Discover the secrets of a fallen alien civilization through immersive dialogue and exploration.

useCases.title: Study narrative structure
useCases.description: Learn how branching narratives and environmental storytelling create engaging interactive fiction.

useCases.title: Practice conversational English
useCases.description: Read natural astronaut dialogue mixing Chinese and English in context.

promptTemplates.title: Start exploration
promptTemplates.prompt: Stella, tell me what you see at the entrance of the ancient ruins.

promptTemplates.title: Read ancient history
promptTemplates.prompt: What story does the mosaic on the ground tell? What happened to this civilization?

promptTemplates.title: Investigate technology
promptTemplates.prompt: Describe what you find in the technology hall. Is any of it still active?

promptTemplates.title: Make ethical choice
promptTemplates.prompt: The central crystal contains immense knowledge. What do you decide to do? Should you take it?

bestPractices: Let Stella guide you through each stage before moving to the next story beat.
Ask follow-up questions about artifacts and discoveries for deeper narrative detail.
Consider both scientific curiosity and ethical implications when making choices.
antiPatterns: Rushing through multiple stages without appreciating the environmental storytelling.
Ignoring the ethical dimensions of discovery and cultural respect.
Treating Stella as a tool rather than engaging with her character development.

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, it works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code for interactive role-play sessions.

faq.question: How long does the chapter take to complete?
faq.answer: Approximately 35-45 minutes depending on how thoroughly you explore and question Stella.

faq.question: Can I combine this with other chapters?
faq.answer: Yes, recommended chapters include daily-science, escape-plan, and alien-encounter for a complete experience.

faq.question: Is my data stored anywhere?
faq.answer: No, this is a prompt-based skill with no data storage or network connections.

faq.question: Why does Stella mix Chinese and English?
faq.answer: This reflects her character background as a Chinese-American astronaut, adding authenticity.

faq.question: How many endings are there?
faq.answer: Three main endings: Archaeologist, Discoverer, and Revelation, based on your choices and discoveries.
